infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Safe911 needs microphone access to connect you with emergency services.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Safe911 needs camera access to record evidence in emergencies.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Safe911 uses your location to send help to the right place.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Safe911 uses background location to alert contacts even when the app is closed.

plugins.cameraPermission: Safe911 uses your camera to record evidence.

plugins.microphonePermission: Safe911 uses your mic for emergency calls.
